caption: The video appears to be a screen recording of an online presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content displayed is a visual map or diagram from a website called "stw.kumu.io," which shows various interconnected nodes labeled with terms such as "model sharing," "model & play," and "moments." These nodes seem to represent different concepts or stages in a process related to trial and learning within systems. In the top right corner, there is a small embedded video showing three individuals in a theatrical setting, possibly illustrating a scenario or example relevant to the discussion. The overall context suggests an educational or professional setting where complex ideas are being explained through visual aids and live commentary.
